videos.title: We’re Keeping the Ocean Wild — and You Can Join Us | Sylvia A. Earle | TED
videos.author: TED
videos.description: In 2009, marine biologist Sylvia Earle stood on the TED stage and made a wish: to build a global network of "Hope Spots" and protect the ocean before it's too late. videos.title: Your new playlist might be right outside your door #TEDTalks

videos.description: What if the calm you feel when you hear birdsong isn't a coincidence, but ancient evolutionary wiring ... a signal that once meant safety? videos.title: 30 is not the new 20 — here’s what you should do right now #TEDTalks

videos.description: Clinical psychologist Meg Jay has a bold message for twentysomethings: Contrary to popular belief, your 20s are not a throwaway decade.
